ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate接受0到125之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率高于125 fps

ast.name: error
ast.source: `@import` rules can't be nested inside other rules. Please move it to the top level and put it before regular rules. Keep in mind that they can only be used within global styles.
ast.target: `@import`规则不能嵌套在其他规则内。请将其移至顶层并放在常规规则之前。请注意，它们只能在全局样式中使用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `@import` rules can't be after other rules. Please put your `@import` rules before your other rules.
ast.target: `@import`规则不能在其他规则之后。请将您的`@import`规则放在其他规则之前。

ast.name: error
ast.source: It looks like you're using the css prop on Global, did you mean to use the styles prop instead?
ast.target: 看起来您正在Global上使用css属性，您是否想改用styles属性？

ast.name: error
ast.source:
You have passed styles created with `css` from `@emotion/react` package to the `cx`.
`cx` is meant to compose class names (strings) so you should convert those styles to a class name by passing them to the `css` received from <ClassNames/> component.
ast.target: 您已将使用`@emotion/react`包中的`css`创建的样式传递给了`cx`。\n`cx`旨在组合类名（字符串），因此您应该通过将这些样式传递给从<ClassNames/>组件接收的`css`来将其转换为类名。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `fontSize` is required to be a number.

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: `htmlFontSize` is required to be a number.

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "props" must be a string or Array.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 \"props\" 必须是字符串或数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "easing" must be a string.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 \"easing\" 必须是字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MUI: Argument "delay" must be a number or a string.
ast.target: MUI: 参数 \"delay\" 必须是数字或字符串。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The ReactIs.isAsyncMode() alias has been deprecated, and will be removed in React 18+.
ast.target: ReactIs.isAsyncMode()别名已被弃用，并将在React 18+中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The ReactIs.isConcurrentMode() alias has been deprecated, and will be removed in React 18+.
ast.target: ReactIs.isConcurrentMode()别名已被弃用，并将在React 18+中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You are loading @emotion/react when it is already loaded. Running multiple instances may cause problems. This can happen if multiple versions are used, or if multiple builds of the same version are used.
ast.target: 您正在加载@emotion/react，但它已经加载过了。运行多个实例可能会导致问题。如果使用了多个版本，或者使用了同一版本的多个构建，就可能发生这种情况。
